answer:
Podio is a flexible work management platform that allows teams to build custom applications and workflows without coding [1][2].

Yes, the Podio Free plan includes developer API access [3][4]. All plans, including the Free tier, provide a baseline of 1,000 API calls per day [3][4]. If you require higher capacity, you can purchase paid API Growth add-ons, which are available exclusively on paid plans and allow for scaling up to 50,000 calls per hour [3]. Access is self-serve, and you can sign up for the Free plan directly on the Podio website [5][6].
